2605.11598.title: EpiCastBench: Datasets and Benchmarks for Multivariate Epidemic Forecasting
2605.11598.paper_summary: The increasing adoption of data-driven decision-making in public health has established epidemic forecasting as a critical area of research. Recent advances in multivariate forecasting models better capture complex temporal dependencies than conventional univariate approaches, which model individual series independently. Despite this potential, the development of robust epidemic forecasting methods is constrained by the lack of high-quality benchmarks comprising diverse multivariate datasets across infectious diseases and geographical regions. To address this gap, we present EpiCastBench, a large-scale benchmarking framework featuring 40 curated (correlated) multivariate epidemic datasets. These publicly available datasets span a wide range of infectious diseases and exhibit diverse characteristics in terms of temporal granularity, series length, and sparsity. We analyze these datasets to identify their global features and structural patterns. To ensure reproducibility and fair comparison, we establish standardized evaluation settings, including a unified forecasting horizon, consistent preprocessing pipelines, diverse performance metrics, and statistical significance testing. By leveraging this framework, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of 15 multivariate forecasting models spanning statistical baselines to state-of-the-art deep learning and foundation models. All datasets and code are publicly available on Kaggle (https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/aimltsf/epicastbench) and GitHub (https://github.com/aimltsf/EpiCastBench).
2605.11598.paper_summary_zh: 公共衛生中數據驅動決策的日益採用使得疫情預測成為一個關鍵的研究領域。<lb/>最近在多變量預測模型方面的進展比傳統的單變量方法更好地捕捉複雜的時間依賴性，後者獨立地建模個別序列。<lb/>儘管有這種潛力，穩健的疫情預測方法的發展受到缺乏高質量基準的限制，這些基準由來自不同傳染病和地理區域的多樣化多變量數據集組成。<lb/>為了解決這一空白，我們提出了EpiCastBench，一個大型基準框架，包含40個精心策劃的（相關的）多變量疫情數據集。<lb/>這些公開可用的數據集涵蓋了廣泛的傳染病，並在時間粒度、序列長度和稀疏性等方面展現出多樣的特徵。<lb/>我們分析這些數據集以識別其全球特徵和結構模式。<lb/>為了確保可重複性和公平比較，我們建立了標準化的評估設置，包括統一的預測視野、一致的預處理管道、多樣的性能指標和統計顯著性測試。<lb/>通過利用這一框架，我們對15個多變量預測模型進行了全面評估，涵蓋了統計基準到最先進的深度學習和基礎模型。<lb/>所有數據集和代碼均可在Kaggle（https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/aimltsf/epicastbench）和GitHub（https://github.com/aimltsf/EpiCastBench）上公開獲取。
2605.11598.author: Madhurima Panja et.al.
2605.11598.authors: Madhurima Panja, Danny D'Agostino, Huitao Li, Tanujit Chakraborty, Nan Liu
